'''His Faithful Servants''' is a short [[miniquest]] involving one small favour from the [[Strange Old Man]]. Despite the later release date, the events of the miniquest occur prior to [[Secrets of the North]] chronologically.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to the [[Strange Old Man]] wandering in the [[Barrows]], east of [[Mort'ton]].
|startmap = 3565,3292
|difficulty = Experienced
|description = The Strange Old Man at the Barrows in Morytania has been acting even stranger than usual...
|length = Very Short
|requirements = *[[Priest in Peril]]
|items = * Combat equipment to defeat the [[Barrows Brothers]]
* [[Spade]]
|recommended = *{{SCP|Combat|70|link=yes}}
*Teleports to [[Barrows]]
*[[Strange old lockpick]]
*[[Ghommal's hilt 2]] or higher - removes Prayer drain when worn
|kills = * [[Verac the Defiled]] (level 115)
* [[Dharok the Wretched]] (level 115)
* [[Ahrim the Blighted]] (level 98)
* [[Torag the Corrupted]] (level 115)
* [[Karil the Tainted]] (level 98)
* [[Guthan the Infested]] (level 115)
|leagueRegion = <poem>
{{LeagueRegion|Morytania}} - location requirement
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Desert}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the miniquest
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
Speak to the [[Strange Old Man]] at the [[Barrows]]. He will ask that you retrieve an icon that the [[Barrows Brothers]] have guarded and that an unknown entity wants back.

Players must defeat all six brothers and then open the [[Barrows chest]] to receive the [[strange icon]]. For a guide on taking on the brothers, [[Barrows/Strategies|see here]]. 

You '''MUST''' have enough inventory space to receive the strange icon when looting the chest, as it will not drop to the ground and will require you to defeat all the brothers again. If you want to be sure that you will receive the icon, leave at least six inventory spaces open before searching the chest.

After receiving the strange icon, speak with the Strange Old Man again to complete the miniquest. 

==Rewards==
* A [[dusty lamp]], which awards 20,000 [[Prayer]] experience.
* A [[crypt map]] that upon studying permanently reveals the minimap while in the Barrows crypt and is then destroyed.

==Required for completing==
* [[Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire]]

==Transcript==
{{Hastranscript|miniquest}}

==Trivia==
* The miniquest was first teased during the [[April 2023 Game Jam]] by [[Mod Ed]].{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ed|url=https://twitter.com/JagexEd/status/1651619632443273217|date=27 April 2023|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/108843|archivedate=27 April 2023|quote=Yo, @JagexLenny, I don't even know what's going on here. #OSRSGameJam}}
* The retrieval of the strange icon from the Barrows for a mysterious benefactor is heavily reminiscent of the ''RuneScape 3'' quest {{RSL|The Temple at Senntisten}}, in which the player retrieves it for [[Azzanadra]] as one of the items he requires in order to communicate with [[Zaros]] in [[Freneskae]]. This is alluded to in the Strange Old Man's dialogue after destroying it (''The old plan is gone. We're not doing it that way.'').
